name: @lumo/super-agent
description: Lumo Super Agent — chat UI + orchestrator. Boots the agent registry, runs the Claude tool-use loop, gates money-moving tools behind hash-verified confirmation, streams results over SSE.

scripts.test: npm run lint:registry && node --experimental-strip-types tests/voice.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/mission-context.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/lumo-mission.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/trip-optimization.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/audio-transcription.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/pdf-extraction.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/image-embedding.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/anomaly-detection.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/forecasting.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/metric-insights.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/preference-events.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/oauth-callback.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/registry-config.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/agent-bridge-scope.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/content-indexing.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/workspace-lead-classifier.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/marketplace-intelligence.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/archive-recall.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types tests/history-replay.test.mjs
